title: Bridge Essay: Loving-kindness meditation (LKM) modulates brain-heart connection: An EEG case s

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** (Phase 8) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Formless/Absorption to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Loving-kindness meditation (LKM) modulates brain-heart connection: An EEG case study.** — Front Hum Neurosci. PMID: 36118979. DOI: 10.3389/fnhum.2022.891377. Loving-Kindness Meditation (LKM) is an efficient mental practice with along history that has recently attracted interest in the fields of neuroscience, medicine and education. However, the neural characters and underlying mechanisms have not yet been fully illustrated, which has hindered its practical usefulness.
